abandoned_checkout_content: I noticed you were checking out Rallly Pro earlier. I wanted to reach out to see if you had any questions or needed help with anything.
abandoned_checkout_offer: To help you get started, you can get {discount}% off your first year. Just use the code below when you check out:
abandoned_checkout_preview: Exclusive offer: Get {discount}% off your first year of Rallly Pro!
abandoned_checkout_subject: Get {discount}% off your first year of Rallly Pro
abandoned_checkout_support: If you have any questions about Rallly Pro or need help with anything at all, just reply to this email. I'm here to help!
changeEmailRequest_text1: We've received a request to change the email address for your account from {fromEmail} to {toEmail}.
changeEmailRequest_text2: To complete this change, please click the button below:
changeEmailRequest_text3: This link will expire in 10 minutes. If you did not request this change, please ignore this email.
common_disableNotifications: You can manage your notification settings to stop receiving these emails.
eventCanceledContent: {hostName} has canceled {title} that was scheduled for:
finalizeHost_content2: We've notified participants and sent them calendar invites.
finalizeHost_preview: Final date booked! We've notified participants and sent them calendar invites.
finalizeParticipant_content: {hostName} has booked {title} for the following date:
finalizeParticipant_content2: Please find attached a calendar invite for this event.
license_key_activationSteps: Follow these instructions to activate your license on your Rallly Self-Hosted instance.
license_key_content: Your purchase has been confirmed and your license key has been generated.
license_key_preview: Your license key has been generated.
license_key_support: Reply to this email or contact us at {supportEmail} if you need help.
login_content2: You're receiving this email because a request was made to login to . If this wasn't you, contact {supportEmail}.
newComment_preview: Go to your poll to see what they said.
newParticipant_content2: Go to your poll to see the new response.
newParticipant_preview: Go to your poll to see the new response.
newParticipantConfirmation_content: Your response to {title} has been submitted.
newParticipantConfirmation_content2: While the poll is still open you can change your response using the link below.
newParticipantConfirmation_footnote: You are receiving this email because a response was submitted on <domain />. If this wasn't you, please ignore this email.
newParticipantConfirmation_preview: To edit your response use the link below
newPoll_content: Your meeting poll titled {title} is ready! Share it using the link below:
newPoll_preview: Share your participant link to start collecting responses.
register_codeValid: This code is valid for 15 minutes
register_text: Please use the following 6-digit verification code to verify your email
resetPassword_content: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new password.
resetPassword_content2: If you didn't request a password reset, you can ignore this email. Your password will not change unless you create a new one. If this request is suspicious, contact {supportEmail}.
resetPassword_preview: Use this link to reset your password.
spaceInvite_content: {inviterName} has invited you to join the {spaceName} space as a {role}.
